basic_details.job_title: HAL Visiting Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Hindustan Aeronautics Limited (HAL) Visiting Consultant Notification 2026 has been released on 15 June 2026 on the official website of HAL. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the HAL Visiting Consultant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: BDS with MDS in Endodontics, MBBS+MD Radiology/ DNB radiology/ DMRE/DMRD
qualification.details: Endodontist: BDS with MDS in Endodontics Radiologist: MBBS+MD Radiology/ DNB radiology/ DMRE/DMRD

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for HAL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.hal-india.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the HAL Visiting Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the HAL Visiting Consultant posts is 23rd June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the HAL Visiting Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies available for the Visiting Consultant posts in Hindustan Aeronautics Limited.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this HAL recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this HAL recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the HAL Visiting Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The required qualifications are BDS with MDS in Endodontics for Endodontist and MBBS+MD Radiology/ DNB radiology/ DMRE/DMRD for Radiologist.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the HAL Visiting Consultant posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit for the HAL Visiting Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Visiting Consultant posts is 65 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the HAL Visiting Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by a personal interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for HAL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification can be downloaded from the HAL website, and a link is provided in the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these HAL Visiting Consultant positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Which city in Maharashtra is this HAL recruitment for?
faq.answer: This HAL recruitment is for Nashik, Maharashtra.
